description: Overall I like the app and their customer service was excellent. Responded to my inquiry professional, quickly, and we're very courteous.
author: Fabio R.
pros: Easy to install and easy to use. Really useful.
cons: At times it can get a bit buggy and you have to close the app routinely to get it working properly. While the set up is fairly easy it would be wise to have some minor instructions/tips when setting up employee schedules and date ranges.

author: Natalie P.
pros: Since our employees are typically in field and don't come to office, the convenience of being able to have app on phone for clock in is crucial. Having the ability to clock in employees who have forgotten or enter time manually is another feature that is helpful. All at reasonable pricing.
cons: I have to make some adjustments to timesheets when I download to excel in order to have details needed for jobs.

author: Kenneth G.
pros: I love that ezclocker gives my employer my exact location and time when checking in.
cons: The software in the past seemed to have a few glitches when checking in and out.

description: It has been a great experience for us! We would definitely recommend ezClocker.
author: Nils N.
pros: This is a great deal! Almost all other apps like this cost money to use. It allows us to have our hourly employees clock in and clock out when they get to and leave work. It also has gps tracking on it. Very cool!
cons: We have no cons at the moment. We've enjoyed the software and it's a great value! No other apps like this are free.

description: Easy to use, easy for workers to use
author: Melissa S.
pros: I love that I can see where workers clock in and out so I know if they are on the job site when they clock in
cons: Sometimes the system is down and makes it difficult for the works to clock in but that could be more of a phone or phone service issue

description: Here in there the app May go slow not a big issue
author: Anthony C.
pros: What I like most about the software is the GPS coordinates so I can know that employees are actually on a job site when you’re clocking in and clocking out.
cons: What I like most about the software is the GPS coordinates so I can know that employees are actually on a job site when you’re clocking in and clocking out.

description: Simplified hours tracking for employees
author: Matt B.
pros: Ease of use, connectivity with employees, simple to calculate hours
cons: I haven’t found anything that I don’t like about it.

description: I am so busy with running my farm operation that putting the time clock burden on my employees has freed me up to do other tasks. Plus my employees just have to email me their time sheets and I can easily review them and cut their paychecks.
author: Burkhart L.
pros: Easy to use and to set up. Makes it easier to keep track of employees' time
cons: Having to annotations when you edit time.

review_title: Great App for Employees and Employers
description: Excellent App
author: Michelle W.
pros: I like how easy to use this App is for our employees to clock in/out I also like how easy it is for me to get the hours sent to my email so I can do up their payroll
cons: rarely it doesn't connect for employee to clock in/out

author: Judy S.
pros: ability to use, ability to correct times etc. ease of access
cons: nothing at all, it has been wonderful! Highly recommend

author: Renata S.
pros: It eliminates time cards and it has GPS tracking so that we know where our employees are at all times and if they are being honest.
cons: It's a little too easy to delete information.

description: ezClocker is worth every penny; From time savings to clock-in location verification. It is great!
author: Charlie C.
pros: ezClocker was easy to implement. Great software to manages a very independent and scattered workforce. I can review, edit and complete payroll in minutes. My bookkeeper loves the one-page summary report.
cons: I do wish there was a break function but employees can still clock out and back in.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Easy to use; effective; inexpensive.
author: Mark W.
pros: Very east to use software for tracking hours worked for our part-time workers. Also, very easy to run reports for payroll processing
cons: I don't have any concerns or issues with this software.

review_title: Easy, cheap and excellent technical support
description: This is a very useful tool for my business, easy to use, and excellent customer support. your webpage it is so easy to understand.
author: Ernesto R.

description: It's user friendly and its very easy to deploy this to the shop.
author: Joel T.
pros: I can easily look at the labour cost per project/job that I manage. The kiosk feature is also amazing. I asked my crews to provide a 4 digit PIN that they can easily remember and its a walk in the park for them. Currently I'm on on 30-day trial and definitely will subscribe to permanently use this.
cons: The only downside is there are odd times when and employee clocks in/out it takes too long to process so that's why sometimes they have to wait for 30 seconds to a minute to ensure that they're in/out.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: After my time clock gave out I went to timesheets but that did not work out very well with the employee 's ie. Integrity and timeliness of completion. Ezclocker was recommended to me by a local farmer and it has worked for me.
author: Toni H.
pros: Easy to implement practical and convenient. The GPS location of sign in and out with the use of the employee's cell phone or computer. Scheduling ability with ease. Time reports are easy to understand in standard or military time.
cons: The only issue where it gets confusing is during daylight saving time in our California/Arizona boarder. Hopefully California will stop the time change soon.

description: This is so much easier with keeping track of your time card because you can use your phone to clock in and clock out. So very convenient!
author: Kathleen M.
pros: It make you feel like you’re in control of your time card! Also if you forget to clock in or out you can make a note and the administrator can fix it with the correct time. I also love that you can watch your hours for the week.
cons: I don’t think that there is anything about this site that I don’t like!

description: Saved myself a lot of money with the gps clock in/out More accurate hours
author: R. Lee B.
pros: Keeps track of hours with GPS clock in/out
cons: Hard to get ahold of someone, no phone number for customer service

description: As a new owner, payroll hours was a tedious, brutal task. EZClocker has taken that away and now I have an easy way to track and report hours. Team members were able to use app very quickly. I have only needed to support twice and my challenge was handled within hours.
author: Janice C.
pros: It is easy for team members to clock in/out on their app. Location is available. If there are errors, they are easy to correct from admin.
cons: I have to purchase next package to add employees.

author: Tara W.
pros: Its very user friendly and gets the job done for our business, easy to set up and the pricing is great!
cons: No complaints for this software at all.

description: I’ve been pleased with the the EZ Clocker app overall, it has been so convenient to for me to be able to see who’s clocked in at the touch of a button.
author: Connie H.
pros: I love the ease of use for my employees, they are able to check their schedules right from their mobile device as well as their tots hours. Good product
cons: I don’t like that I cannot print a copy of the weekly schedule to post for my employees. I also wish that there was a way to duplicate a schedule instead of having to re enter each employee individually for each week.

review_title: Very well put together and maintained.
description: ezClocker has remedied the hassle of manually completing a time accounting worksheet. It also serves very well in the case of off-site working conditions by the use of GPS locating.
author: Skip McGuire M.
pros: Perfect time tracking software that has GPS locating option at the time of clock-in and clock-out process. The export time feature makes it easy to put together a submittable timesheet for sending and/or reviewing.
cons: Don't really have any issues with the software.

description: if you want to have your employees on track , this is a very good option.
author: Maximo L.
pros: Give you the change to get into it with the free version, versatile , easy use . cloud management .
cons: Overall is a very good tracker, no complaints .

description: I used ezClocker for over a year with only 2 employees to keep it free. I finally decided to pay for another app (On The Clock) so I could get the extra features and more user friendly interface.
author: Beth L.
pros: Free if you only have 1 or 2 employees.
cons: It’s just a very basic time clock with no extra features. I always seem to have issues changing the dates as well.

description: Use daily to clock in and out employees.
author: Frank B.
pros: The simplicity of the app. is what I like most.
cons: Unfortunately, for my use I sometimes have to add more than 2 employees and it does not allow.
